syllogism_text: Every single item that is a writing instrument is a tool. There are some pens which are writing instruments. Thus, some pens are tools.

attempts.code:
% Facts (witnesses)
pen(pen1).
writing_instrument(pen1).

% Rules from premises
tool(X) :- writing_instrument(X).

% Validity check
valid_syllogism :- pen(X), tool(X).
